description.content: Returns a lightweight health response for operational checks.

response.name: The requested resource was not found.

description.content: Privacy-preserving MyPayTag identity, consent, alias, and hosted action APIs.

Checks whether submitted paytag candidates are valid and consented for
the dapp context. This route is deliberately candidate-based and does
not expose a list-all paytag or payment-stamp resolver.

response.name: Authorization was checked for the submitted candidates.
The authenticated caller is not allowed to perform this operation.
The caller exceeded a rate limit.

header.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying, when available.

description.content:
Creates a Cubid-hosted paytag setup or consent action for a single
dapp user. This write route requires an `Idempotency-Key` header.

header.description: (Required) Stable caller-generated key used to make write requests safe to retry.

description.content:
Validates submitted opaque paytag aliases for a dapp user. This route
accepts caller-submitted aliases only and does not expose raw stamp
identifiers, wallet routes, route priorities, provider callbacks, or
payment execution details.

response.name: Alias validation completed for the submitted aliases.
The authenticated caller is not allowed to perform this operation.
The caller exceeded a rate limit.

header.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying, when available.

description.content:
Returns the redacted consent-grant status for one dapp-scoped user.
The response is scoped to the caller's app context and does not include
raw destinations, raw stamp values, route preferences, wallet graphs,
or cross-app grant information.

response.name: Grant status for the dapp-scoped user.
The authenticated caller is not allowed to perform this operation.
The caller exceeded a rate limit.

header.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying, when available.

description.content:
Lists redacted identity, alias, and consent lifecycle events for one
dapp-scoped user. This route is for state reconciliation only; it does
not return payment instructions, route diagnostics, provider callback
payloads, settlement state, solvers, bridges, swaps, or execution data.

response.name: Redacted lifecycle events for the dapp-scoped user.
The authenticated caller is not allowed to perform this operation.
The caller exceeded a rate limit.

header.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying, when available.

description.content:
This OpenAPI document is the source of truth for lightweight HTTP API
documentation in this SDK repository.

The first documented surface is the server/Edge MyPayTag paytag identity
and consent contract used by `@cubid/core`. These routes are
dapp-authenticated and must be called from trusted server runtimes, not
directly from browsers.
